common.accessDenied: You don't have access to this page.
common.name: Name

adminEmp.teamChangeWarning: This change will affect future schedules only.
adminEmp.teamChangeImpact: This will affect schedules starting from {date}.
adminEmp.teamImbalanceWarning: This change would create a team imbalance in that week.
adminEmp.teamImbalanceManagerBlock: Team imbalance in that week. Only ADMIN can override.
adminEmp.teamImbalanceConfirm: Please confirm to proceed despite team imbalance.
adminEmp.confirmDeactivateEmployee: Deactivate this employee? They will be hidden from active lists and cannot be assigned to new tasks.
adminEmp.confirmDeleteEmployee: Delete this employee? Their login account (if any) will be removed and the employee will be deactivated.

import.title: Import Dashboard
import.salesImportsDesc: Preview and apply sales data (simple or MSR sheet).
import.monthSnapshotDesc: Upload monthly snapshot for targets and staff data.
import.historicalImportDesc: Import historical daily and staff sales by month.
import.importIssuesDesc: View and resolve import validation errors.

importCenter.title: Import Center
importCenter.intro: Download system-generated Excel templates per boutique, then upload on the linked pages. Templates use live branch codes, employee IDs, and column names expected by parsers—no guessing.
importCenter.legacyHistoricalNote: You opened this view from a legacy historical-import link. Use branch-specific templates below; upload still uses the historical import page.
importCenter.matrixMonthDesc: ScopeId uses boutique code; matches matrix import validation.
importCenter.yearlySalesDesc: One row per employee per day for the selected year; branch-scoped.
importCenter.historicalSnapshotDesc: Headers aligned with historical snapshot parser for the selected month.
importCenter.salesCanonicalNote: Applies still go through existing APIs and SalesEntry canonical rules.
importCenter.boutiqueTargetsDesc: Template for boutique-level targets; apply via Targets import UI.
importCenter.employeeTargetsDesc: Template with stable identifiers for the selected month.
importCenter.historicalPageBanner: Use the unified Import Center to download ready-made templates per branch.
importCenter.histInitialDesc: Backfill SalesEntry only when no row exists for boutique + date + employee. Past closed months (Asia/Riyadh). Does not write the daily ledger.
importCenter.histInitialWarn: Does not overwrite existing SalesEntry rows. Use dry-run first.
importCenter.histCorrectionDesc: Updates existing SalesEntry rows that are not MANUAL (e.g. LEDGER, historical sources). Requires a reason; audited.
importCenter.histCorrectionWarn: Will not create new rows; use Initial import first. Dry-run recommended.
importCenter.correctionReasonPh: e.g. Wrong amount for Jan 2025 — finance approved
importCenter.histSnapshotVsDbNote: Different from “Historical snapshot” below: that flow saves JSON files for reporting only. This section writes canonical SalesEntry via the historical APIs.

administration.calendarDesc: Official holidays, weekly off suspension, day overrides & comp days.
administration.auditLogsDesc: View login and system audit logs.
administration.versionBuildDesc: View version, deploys and build info.
administration.salesIntegrityDesc: Parity checks on SalesEntry (canonical read layer).

salesIntegrity.title: Sales integrity
salesIntegrity.blurb: Run canonical parity contracts for a boutique + month. Requires ADMIN. Uses the same engine as /api/admin/sales-parity-diagnostics.
salesIntegrity.policyNote: These checks are SalesEntry-only. They do not compare SalesEntry totals to the Daily Sales Ledger. Historical HISTORICAL_IMPORT rows may exist only in SalesEntry (Policy A — see docs/historical-ledger-reconciliation.md).
salesIntegrity.needBoutiqueMonth: Enter boutiqueId and a valid month (YYYY-MM).

admin.scheduleEditPermissionHint: Assistant Manager only; has edit by default, Admin can revoke
admin.onlyAdminCanChangePermissions: Only an administrator can change this.
admin.confirmDeleteUser: Permanently delete this user account? They will no longer be able to sign in.
admin.confirmDisableUser: Disable this account? They will not be able to sign in until re-enabled.
admin.cannotDeleteSelf: You cannot delete your own account.

resetEmpId.hint: Select the employee then enter the new number. The current number will be replaced across the system (User + Employee).
resetEmpId.oldAndNewRequired: Current and new number are required.
resetEmpId.mustDiffer: New number must differ from current.
resetEmpId.newMustBeDigits: New number: digits only, at least 3 characters.

resetPassword.hint: Select the employee and enter the new password. They will be required to change it on next login.
resetPassword.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
resetPassword.mismatch: Password and confirmation do not match.
resetPassword.confirm: Confirm: reset this user's password? They will be required to change it on next login.

admin.filterByBoutiqueHint: Table shows only employees assigned to this boutique. To assign more: use All boutiques to find the employee, then Edit or Change Boutique.
admin.employeesEmptyByBoutique: No employees assigned to this boutique. Use All boutiques, then Edit or Change Boutique to assign employees here.

boutiques.confirmDisable: Disable this boutique? It will no longer appear in scope selector for non-admin users.
boutiques.wizardStep2: Assign manager (search by Emp ID / name)

memberships.searchUser: Search by Emp ID or name

system.defaultBoutiqueDescription: Default boutique used when user has no scope selection.
system.confirmDefaultBoutique: Change the default boutique? This affects users with no scope preference.

planner.powerAutomateSetupDesc: Configure your Power Automate flow to POST JSON payloads to the webhook. Required: taskId. Use the Test payload helper below to validate.
planner.headerValueHint: Value must match the webhook secret configured for this integration.
planner.samplePayloadHint: Use Test payload helper below with task.created, task.updated, task.completed, task.uncompleted samples.
planner.testPayloadDesc: Paste or edit a Power Automate payload below, then click Test to validate (dry-run). No data is written.
planner.noUserMappings: No user mappings. Click Add to link a Microsoft email to an employee.
planner.noBucketMappings: No bucket mappings. Click Add to link a Planner bucket to local.

auth.passwordChangedPleaseLogin: Password changed. Please sign in with your new password.
auth.tooManyAttempts: Too many login attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.
auth.connectionError: Cannot connect to server. Check your connection and try again.
auth.noBoutique: Account not assigned to a boutique. Contact admin.
auth.idleSignOut: You were signed out due to inactivity.

idle.warning: You'll be signed out soon due to inactivity. Move the mouse or press a key to stay signed in.

schedule.warningRashidOverflow: Too many at Rashid: PM below AM or minimum
schedule.unsavedLeaveMessage: You have unsaved changes. Leave anyway?

view.excelBanner: You are viewing Classic Excel Mode

schedule.maxColumnsReachedWarning: Max columns reached (6). Some assignments may not be visible in this view.
schedule.approvalNotAllowed: Only Manager or Admin can approve weeks.
schedule.filteredByBoutiqueHint: Showing only employees assigned to the selected branch. Only active (enabled) employees appear in the schedule.
schedule.onlyActiveInSchedule: Only active employees appear in the schedule. Enable employees in Admin → Employees to include them.

tasks.emptyList: No tasks match the current filters.
tasks.deleteConfirm: Delete this task? It will be removed from the list and will no longer appear in assignments.
tasks.errorDuplicatePrimaryBackup1: Primary and Backup 1 cannot be the same.
tasks.errorDuplicatePrimaryBackup2: Primary and Backup 2 cannot be the same.
tasks.errorDuplicateBackup1Backup2: Backup 1 and Backup 2 cannot be the same.

kpi.noOfficialTemplate: No official template. Seed to create.
kpi.noSnapshot: No KPI snapshot for this period.

risk.reasonHighLeaveExposure: High leave exposure relative to workforce

salesRisk.title: Sales Risk Index
salesRisk.reasonAchievementOnTarget: Sales achievement on or above target

narrative.actionReviewSoon: Review in the next few days

insights.noEmployeeTargetsWeek: No employee targets for this week's month.

coverage.title: Coverage
coverage.effectivePolicyWeekSatFri: Week starts Saturday and ends Friday
coverage.effectivePolicyFridayException: Friday is PM-only; effective Min AM is 0.
coverage.minAMInformational: Min AM is informational only; not enforced.
coverage.tableNote: Min AM is informational; the enforcement is PM≥AM and PM≥2.
coverage.beforeAfter: Before: AM {amBefore}, PM {pmBefore}. After: AM {amAfter}, PM {pmAfter}.

home.dateContextHint: Roster, coverage & tasks use selected date · Performance is always today
home.targetsTodayOnlySubtitle: Targets are for today; schedule uses selected date.

compliance.title: Government Documents
compliance.subtitle: Track licenses, certificates, and safety items
compliance.allowedFormats: PDF, PNG, JPG, DOC, XLS (max 50MB, PDF & images auto-compressed)

targetsManagement.title: Target Management
targetsManagement.subtitle: Manage boutique and employee monthly targets; import from Excel.
targetsManagement.columnsSameOrder: Columns must remain in the same order.
targetsManagement.targetInteger: Targets must be integer values only.
targetsManagement.outOfScopeRejected: Rows outside your boutique scope will be rejected.
targetsManagement.noData: No data for the selected filters.

targets.clearBoutiqueTargetConfirm: Remove the boutique target for this month? You can set it again later.
targets.clearMonthSalesConfirm: Delete all sales entries for this month? This cannot be undone.
targets.clearMyMonthEntriesConfirm: Delete all your sales entries for this month? This cannot be undone.
targets.cannotClearCurrentMonth: Cannot delete entries for the current month.
targets.weightedExplanation: Targets are weighted by Role share percent. Each employee's monthly target = Boutique target × (their weight ÷ sum of all active employees' weights).
targets.weightedLeaveAdjusted: Distribution is Role-weighted + Leave-adjusted. Effective weight = role weight × presence factor (present days ÷ scheduled days). Only APPROVED leaves reduce presence. Generate uses current schedule and approved leaves.
targets.resetTargetsConfirmBody: Remove all employee targets for this month? You can generate them again after.
targets.recalculateConfirmBody: This will overwrite all employee targets for this month with the role-weighted, leave-adjusted distribution. Manual overrides will be lost.
targets.regenerateConfirmBody: This will overwrite all employee targets for this month with the role-weighted distribution. Manual overrides will be lost.
targets.regenerateWarningRemaining: Sum of employee targets is below boutique target (Remaining gap). Regenerate will overwrite all employee targets. Continue?
targets.regenerateWarningOver: Sum of employee targets exceeds boutique target (Over by). Regenerate will overwrite all employee targets. Continue?
targets.noEmployees: No employee targets for this month.
targets.warningUnknownRole: Some employees have an unknown role.
targets.warningManyZeroScheduled: Many employees have zero scheduled days in this month.
targets.presenceInfo: Your monthly target is based on
targets.notInSelectedMonth: Today is not in the selected month.
targets.salesEntryPolicyTooltip: You can only edit or delete sales for today and yesterday.
targets.importMsrMonthHint: Used to infer year for dates without year (e.g. 1-Jan).
targets.reasonRequiredAfterDay3: Reason is required when editing targets more than 3 days after distribution.
targets.cannotLockUntilDiffZero: Cannot lock until lines total equals manager total (diff = 0).

summary.title: Sales Summary
summary.subtitle: Week, month and team progress vs target
summary.noDataForPeriod: No sales in this period for the selected boutique.
summary.chartMtdSubtitle: MTD for month of end date

returns.title: Returns / Exchanges
returns.pleaseFillDateEmployeeAmount: Please fill date, employee, and a positive amount.

leadershipImpact.title: Leadership Impact
leadershipImpact.noSalesDataForMonth: No sales data for this month and source.
leadershipImpact.noCoachingFlags: No coaching risk flags detected for this month.

matrixImport.title: Matrix Template Import
matrixImport.description: Upload Excel file (DATA_MATRIX sheet): each row = day, columns = ScopeId, Date, Day, then employee columns. Choose month then Preview then Apply — each person's sales are recorded for the row's date.
matrixImport.applySuccess: Import applied: each employee's sales have been recorded for the corresponding day in the table.

governance.scheduleLocked: This schedule is locked and cannot be edited
governance.approveBeforeLock: Week must be approved before it can be locked

sync.exportSiteHint: Download CSV with taskKey for the selected approved period. Upload this to Planner or use for reference.
sync.uploadPlannerHint: Planner export XLSX (Tasks sheet) or CSV supported.
sync.exportFormatV2Hint: Download CSV ready for Power Automate / Planner (v2 format).

leaves.title: Leaves
leaves.overlapWarning: This leave overlaps with another for this employee.

planner.scheduleExportHint: Task titles: [Boutique] Morning/Afternoon Shift – date, [Rashid] Morning/Afternoon Coverage – date.

inventory.noAssignee: No assignee – all skipped or rotation disabled.
inventory.recomputeHint: Picks the next eligible person in rotation order. Use if the current assignee is absent.
inventory.noZonesAssigned: No zones assigned to you this week.
inventory.confirmMarkAllBody: This will mark {count} zones as completed for this week. Continue?
inventory.dailyReminderText: Reminder: Daily inventory is pending today.
inventory.noZoneAssignmentMessage: You have no zone assignment. Ask your manager.
inventory.stepsToGenerate: Ensure zone assignments are set; records are created when you open this page for the week.
inventory.uploadZonesMapHint: PNG only. Replaces the zones map for all users.
inventory.deleteZonesMapConfirm: Delete the zones map image? It will be removed for all users until a new image is uploaded.
inventory.zonesMapNoImage: No map image. Upload one in the Admin section above.
